CONTENT.Club career: He was playing for young categories of Red Star Belgrade. He was a member of Donji Srem from 2011 to 2015. In June 2015, Lakićević joined Vojvodina.On 2 July 2018, Lakićević signed with Italian Serie A club Genoa.On 24 July 2019, Lakićević joined Serie B club Venezia on loan until 30 June 2020.On 19 January 2021, he signed a 1.5-year contract with Serie B club Reggina.
CONTENT.Personal life: He is also known as "Mogli" (Mowgli) by a character from The Jungle Book. He is a big fan of R'n'R and heavy metal music.
CONTENT.External links: Ivan Lakićević at SoccerwayStats at utakmica.rs

SUMMARY: Ivan "Mogli" Lakićević (Serbian Cyrillic: Иван Лакићевић; born 27 July 1993) is a Serbian footballer who plays as a right-back.
